title: (Junior) Performance Reporting Manager (m/w/d) – Global & Local Finance
summary: Good overlap in reporting, dashboard building, and international stakeholder communication; HSBC programme analytics closely mirrors the P&L/budget reporting requirement, though a formal finance/controlling background is absent.
key_requirements: Degree in Finance, BWL, VWL or comparable (required)
First work experience in performance reporting, controlling, or financial planning (required)
Strong analytical skills and understanding of P&L structures and performance drivers (required)
Very good English — written and spoken (required)
Power BI or other reporting tools (bonus)
matched_skills: Power BI (Microsoft Certified PL-300) — directly matches BI reporting tool requirement
MS Excel — listed as core tool
English C1 — meets 'very good English' requirement
German B1+ — meets bonus German requirement
Budget variance dashboards and burn-rate reports (HSBC — USD 8M programme)
Monthly/weekly financial performance reporting to C-suite
Spend attribution tracking across multiple workstreams
Deviation analysis (budget vs. actual, conceptually applied at HSBC)
International stakeholder communication (EMEA, APAC coverage at GRG Banking)
missing_skills: Formal Finance or Controlling role title / direct finance function experience
P&L structure ownership (HSBC was programme budget, not P&L)
Forecast and budget planning cycle participation
Financial consolidation across legal entities or countries
SAP FI/CO or ERP finance system experience not evidenced
recommended_emphasis: Lead with HSBC role: reframe as 'financial performance analytics for USD 8M programme' — budget variance, spend attribution, weekly burn-rate to C-suite maps directly to reporting manager duties
Highlight Power BI certification as direct match for the BI tool bonus requirement
Emphasise multi-market coverage (EMEA, APAC) to match the regional/international consolidation scope
Stress structured management report creation and executive presentation experience
Frame Leuphana Management degree as comparable to BWL to satisfy education requirement
Mention Qlik Sense and SAP Analytics as additional finance-adjacent tool exposure
location_notes: Hamburg — candidate based in Luneburg, well within commuting distance
risk_flags: No formal controlling or finance department background — may be screened out at ATS
Month-end close and forecast cycle experience not evidenced — core recurring task in role
Junior tag is positive but P&L ownership is still expected from day one
